title: Byron King-Noel, Viscount Ockham
body: Byron King-Noel, 12th Baron Wentworth, styled Viscount Ockham (12 May 1836 – 1 September 1862) was a British peer and the eldest of the three legitimate grandchildren of poet Lord Byron.
categories: Articles lacking reliable references from February 2013
Wikipedia articles needing factual verification from July 2018
